title: solanum morella subsp. nigrum
intro: Solanum morella subsp. nigrum is a plant species that belongs to the nightshade family, known for its dark-colored berries and leaves. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and supporting respiratory health. Herbal preparations of Solanum morella subsp. nigrum include tinctures, infusions, and topical creams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
